eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles; Orange; San Diego, CA; at 05:58 AM ON JAN 29, 2026 Effective until 06:58 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE LOS ANGELES SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT.

ON JANUARY 28, 2026, AT 1:30 PM SOFIA AND ROMEO ORDONEZ WERE ABDUCTED FROM THE CITY OF SANTA CLARITA, CALIFORNIA.  SOFIA ORDONEZ IS A 9 YEAR OLD HISPANIC FEMALE 4 FEET TALL WEIGHING 70 POUNDS WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES. SOFIA ORDONEZ HAS AN UNKNOWN CLOTHING DESCRIPTION.

ROMEO ORDONEZ IS A 12 YEAR OLD HISPANIC MALE 5 FEET 7 INCHES TALL WEIGHING 190 POUNDS WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES. ROMEO ORDONEZ HAS AN UNKNOWN CLOTHING DESCRIPTION.

THE SUSPECT CRISTAL ORDONEZ IS A 45 YEAR OLD HISPANIC FEMALE STANDING 5 FEET TALL WEIGHING 135 POUNDS WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. CRISTAL ORDONEZ HAS AN UNKNOWN CLOTHING DESCRIPTION.

THE SUSPECT IS BELIEVED TO BE DRIVING A 2019 BLACK KIA SORENTO WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE 8LRF237

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
